Class EventsTest

java.lang.Object
jogo.engine.EventsTest
class EventsTest extends Object
Test class for the Events class. This class tests the different random events that can occur in the game. It verifies if the resource and score modifiers are correctly changed according to the event that is triggered. The random behavior is controlled by replacing the random object in Events with a mocked Random object. This allows each test to force a specific result.
Author:
Fabio Cruz, Tiago Silva

  • Constructor Details

    • EventsTest

      EventsTest()

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      @BeforeEach void setUp()
      Creates a new Events object before each test. This makes sure that each test starts with a fresh object.

    • testNoEventTriggered

      @Test void testNoEventTriggered()
      Tests when no special event is triggered. The first random value is 45. Since the event only happens when the value is lower than 45, no event should occur. Expected result: resource modifier stays 1 and score modifier stays 1.

    • testEventDoubleEverything

      @Test void testEventDoubleEverything()
      Tests the event where both resource production and score are doubled. The mocked random values force the event with index 0. Expected result: resource modifier becomes 2 and score modifier becomes 2.

    • testEventZeroProduction

      @Test void testEventZeroProduction()
      Tests the event where structures do not produce resources. The mocked random values force the event with index 1. Expected result: resource modifier becomes 0 and score modifier stays 1.

    • testEventDoubleProduction

      @Test void testEventDoubleProduction()
      Tests the event where structures produce double resources. The mocked random values force the event with index 2. Expected result: resource modifier becomes 2 and score modifier stays 1.

    • testEventZeroScore

      @Test void testEventZeroScore()
      Tests the event where structures do not give score. The mocked random values force an event from the default case. Expected result: resource modifier stays 1 and score modifier becomes 0.

    • testEventDoubleScore

      @Test void testEventDoubleScore()
      Tests the event where structures give double score. The mocked random values force the event with index 4. Expected result: resource modifier stays 1 and score modifier becomes 2.

    • testEventGeneralStrike

      @Test void testEventGeneralStrike()
      Tests the general strike event. The mocked random values force the event with index 3. Expected result: resource modifier becomes 0 and score modifier becomes 0.

    • testModifiersAreResetOnEachCall

      @Test void testModifiersAreResetOnEachCall()
      Tests if the modifiers are reset every time triggerEvent is called. First, an event is forced to change the modifiers. Then, a second call forces no event to occur. The modifiers should return to their default values. Expected result: resource modifier returns to 1 and score modifier returns to 1.
